extraction.one_line_summary: GROENEWEGEN outsprinted EWAN by centimeters in Chalon-sur-Saône after MØRKØV and RICHEZE executed textbook dual lead-out inside 1km
tactical_patterns: MØRKØV-RICHEZE dual lead-out allowed VIVIANI's train to stay organized through chaos, swinging off perfectly inside 1km
SAGAN isolated after teammate JANSE VAN RENSBURG pulled off early at 1km, forced to box-ride without positioning support
EWAN timed his surge late from outside top-5 wheel positions, nearly won despite terrible pre-sprint placement deficit

rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: positive: recovered from Brussels crash outside finish to win sprint, shows resilience under pressure
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: positive: came from poor positioning to nearly win, exceptional acceleration in final 150m suggests peak form
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: bumped and barged mid-sprint, lacked closing speed of GROENEWEGEN/EWAN despite good positioning at 1km
rider_signals.MØRKØV Michael: positive: executed lead-out perfectly through tight positioning chaos, shepherded VIVIANI's train flawlessly
rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: negative: crashed into signage at 7km, significant facial/knee injuries but continued, likely compromised for mountains
